summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the world’s most valued cryptocurrency, moved lower on Tuesday, with prices dropping below the $23,000 mark.

headline: Does Being On Facebook Make You Richer? Here's What Meta's Research Says
summary: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) run Facebook says its “years-long” research with economist Raj Chetty’s Opportunity Insights has led it to conclude that “social connections” play an important role in economic mobility.

headline: Pelosi Effect? Why Key Apple Supplier TSMC's Shares Are Slipping Today
summary: Shares of chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor Mfg. Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM) fell as much as 2.98% in Asia trading on Tuesday after China expressed anger at reports of U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi making a possible trip to Taiwan later in the day.

headline: Elon Musk Sends Meme Coin Named After His Pet Up 30% With His Tweet
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk sent another Dogecoin-inspired (CRYPTO: DOGE) meme coin rallying with a tweet on Monday.
